hooks.prompt:
A file was just modified: $ARGUMENTS

Check if this is a README or documentation file. If NOT a README file (exclude README.md, docs/, etc.), remind the user to review and update the README to reflect the changes made.

If it IS a README/docs file, skip the reminder.

Respond with a brief reminder message if needed, or just acknowledge if no reminder is needed.

hooks.command: git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE '^(backend-|web-|expo-|\.[^/]+)' && ! git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE '(README|readme|CHANGELOG|changelog|docs/)' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"README validation: You are committing project changes but README was not updated. Please review and update the relevant README files (README.md, service-specific docs, CHANGELOG) to reflect your changes. Use git add to stage README updates, then retry the commit."}' || echo '{"continue":true}'
